revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 14:58:57
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
revision.text: {{Commons category}} {{EstcatCountry|Japan}} [[Category:1646 establishments in Asia|Japan]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[en:Category:1646 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:1646 establishments in Asia|Japan]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
